name: Carrot Cake
short_description: In this Easter Horror Game compete in the mini games, solve puzzles, and escape the Easter Bunny. PS1 style survival horror!
detailed_description:
Carrot Cake is an Easter Horror game following a group of kids in an Easter theme park. Compete in the Easter games, solve puzzles, and escape the facility in this PSX style survival horror.

The Easter Bunny has set up a fun-filled event of games, prizes, and laughter for all kids around! Parents drop off their kids for a day of egg hunting, fun challenges, and competing for a prize! But this vibrant event has a dark secret. Can you escape before becoming the next missing child?

Survive Deadly Games

Usually games like Egg Hunts, Hide and Seek, Chasing Chickens, and Painting Easter Eggs are innocent and fun. But here there's a loser and a winner. Make sure you're not the loser.

Solve Puzzles

Behind the pastel colored walls are the keys to your survival. Search for clues, crack codes, and unlock hidden areas before time runs out.

Escape the Easter Bunny

Don't trust the Easter Bunny mascot or his friends. Kids are going missing and you're running out of time.

Wishlist Now... Before It's Too Late.
